returns.notSatisfiedNoProblem: Not satisfied? No problem! We make returns easy.
returns.swapForDifferentSizeOrColor: Swap for a different size or colour
returns.contactUsDescription: Email us at returns@adventureworks.co.uk or call (020) 1234 5678 to initiate your return.
returns.packItUpDescription: Securely pack the item in its original packaging with all tags and accessories.
returns.shipItBackDescription: Use the prepaid shipping label we provide or send via your preferred carrier.
returns.getRefundedDescription: Once inspected, refunds are processed within 5-7 working days to your original payment method.
returns.itemsReturnedWithin30Days: • Items returned within 30 days of delivery
returns.defectiveOrDamagedItems: • Defective or damaged items (at any time)
returns.bikeReturnsDescription: Bikes may be returned within 14 days of delivery if unassembled and in original packaging. Assembled bikes are subject to a 15% restocking fee. Please contact us for special arrangements.
returns.exchangeDescription: Need a different size or colour? Exchanges are free and easy! Just mention "exchange" when you contact us and we'll dispatch your new item as soon as we receive your return.
returns.exchangeNote: Note: Exchanges are subject to availability. If your preferred item is out of stock, we’ll process a full refund instead.
returns.supportDescription: Our customer support team is here to help! Get in touch with us and we'll respond within 24 hours.

faq.howLongDoesShippingTakeAnswer: Standard shipping typically takes 3-5 working days within mainland UK. Expedited shipping (1-2 working days) is available at checkout for an additional fee. International orders may take 7-14 working days depending on the destination.
faq.doYouOfferFreeShippingAnswer: Yes! We offer free standard delivery on all orders over £75. Orders under £75 have a flat rate delivery charge of £7.99.
faq.canIChangeOrCancelMyOrder: Can I change or cancel my order?
faq.canIChangeOrCancelMyOrderAnswer: You can modify or cancel your order within 1 hour of placing it. After that, orders enter our fulfilment process and cannot be changed. Please contact us immediately if you need to make changes.
faq.howDoITrackMyOrder: How do I track my order?
faq.howDoITrackMyOrderAnswer: Once your order dispatches, you'll receive a confirmation email with tracking information. You can also track your order anytime by visiting the Order Tracking page in your account.
faq.whatIsYourReturnPolicyAnswer: We offer a 30-day return policy for unused items in original packaging. Bikes must be unassembled and returned within 14 days. See our full Returns Policy page for details.
faq.howDoIStartAReturn: How do I start a return?
faq.howDoIStartAReturnAnswer: Contact our support team at returns@adventureworks.co.uk or call 020 7123 4567. We'll provide a prepaid shipping label and guide you through the process.
faq.whenWillIReceiveMyRefund: When will I receive my refund?
faq.whenWillIReceiveMyRefundAnswer: Refunds are processed within 5-7 working days after we receive and inspect your return. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.
faq.canIExchangeAnItemForDifferentSize: Can I exchange an item for a different size?
faq.canIExchangeAnItemForDifferentSizeAnswer: Absolutely! Exchanges are free. Just mention "exchange" when contacting us and specify the size or colour you need. We'll ship the new item as soon as we receive your return.
faq.howDoIChooseRightBikeSize: How do I choose the right bicycle size?
faq.howDoIChooseRightBikeSizeAnswer: Bike sizing depends on your height and inseam length. Generally: 5'0"-5'4" = XS/S, 5'4"-5'8" = S/M, 5'8"-6'0" = M/L, 6'0"-6'4" = L/XL. Check the product page for specific sizing charts or contact us for personalised advice.
faq.areYourBikesFullyAssembledAnswer: Bikes ship 85% assembled to ensure safe transport. You'll need to attach the front wheel, handlebars, pedals, and saddle. Basic tools and instructions are included. We also offer professional assembly at select locations.
faq.doYouOfferAWarrantyAnswer: Yes! All bikes come with a 2-year warranty on frames and a 1-year warranty on components. Accessories and clothing have a 90-day warranty against manufacturing defects.
faq.whatIfAnItemIsOutOfStock: What if an item is out of stock?
faq.whatIfAnItemIsOutOfStockAnswer: You can sign up for notifications on the product page to be alerted when it's back in stock. Popular items typically restock within 2-4 weeks.
faq.whatPaymentMethodsDoYouAccept: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.whatPaymentMethodsDoYouAcceptAnswer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Discover), PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. We also offer financing through Affirm for orders over £150.
faq.isMyPaymentInformationSecureAnswer: Absolutely. We use industry-standard SSL encryption and never store your complete credit card information. All transactions are processed through secure, PCI-compliant payment providers.
faq.doINeedAnAccountToPlaceOrder: Do I need an account to place an order?
faq.doINeedAnAccountToPlaceOrderAnswer: No, you can checkout as a guest. However, creating an account lets you track orders, save your wishlist, and checkout faster on future purchases.
faq.howDoIResetMyPassword: How do I reset my password?
faq.howDoIResetMyPasswordAnswer: Click "Sign In" then "Forgot Password" and enter your email address. We'll send you a link to reset your password. The link expires in 24 hours for security purposes.
faq.ourFriendlySupportTeam: Our friendly support team is here to help!
